summary: Crisp audience recording captures a solid, safe performance with an engaging setlist and lively Phil banter.
review: Both reviewers rave about the audio quality, noting that the audience recording sounds as clear as a soundboard thanks to Swayne's close mic placement. The show itself is described as a "safe and reasonable" performance with a set‑list that fans love, highlighted by Phil Lesh’s playful crowd interaction at the start of the second set. No major flaws are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: High praise for recording fidelity (one of the best audience recordings) and a solid, enjoyable performance; limited number of reviews keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear sound comparable to a soundboard; close mic placement captures detail with no notable dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist is well‑received and described as enjoyable; performance deemed safe and reasonable, with Phil Lesh’s crowd banter adding extra fun at the start of the second set.

band_member_comments.Phil: Positive mention of Phil's banter with the crowd to start the second set.
